hero_subtitle: SFTY gives compliance leaders a unified view into transaction monitoring workflows that reduce manual workload, preserve audit evidence, and support scalable risk management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Transaction monitoring slows as alerts multiply
problem_description: Executives struggle with growing volumes of alerts that overwhelm compliance teams and create manual bottlenecks. This fragmentation hides operational risk and weakens oversight across transaction monitoring workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects alerts, case workflows, provider risk data and review history into a unified control layer so leadership can monitor transaction monitoring operations with clear oversight and audit trail.
workflow_title: From provider checks to transaction review
workflow_description: SFTY channels multiple provider outputs through risk rules and alert triage to case creation, evidence gathering, decision logging and reporting oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond alert overload. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY helps executives scale transaction monitoring by turning fragmented alerts into structured cases, clear decisions and audit-ready evidence for stronger operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs scaling transaction monitoring with clear provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence and enterprise deployment controls from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support scaling transaction monitoring workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Show how transaction alerts route through compliance cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Explain how audit-ready evidence preserves transaction monitoring history
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY enables risk visibility for executive oversight
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance layer that reduces operational risk, improves visibility, strengthens auditability, and supports scalable transaction monitoring for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY scale transaction monitoring workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects alerts, provider outputs and regulatory rules into structured workflows, automating case creation, decision logging and escalation to streamline transaction monitoring without overwhelming teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and provider evidence to support audit-ready records are maintained for internal review, banking due diligence and regulator inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, integrating their outputs into one controlled compliance operating workflow without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, cases and reports to enhance oversight and operational efficiency.
final_title: Scale transaction monitoring with connected oversight
final_description: Review how SFTY supports scalable transaction risk control, audit-ready evidence, and integrated case management for VASP compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
